MOTION Notice Of Motion For Order For Dismissal
Off Calendar Dec-11-2001 Continued To Mar-07-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Althea V. Bovell, Esq. 957-1800 for pltf; Cynthia K. Long, Esq. 495-1930 for deft & moving party LandAmerica Financial Group, Inc.; W. Granvle Barker, 561-9104 deft in pro per; Christopher J. Shenfield, Esq. 650/342-9600 for Intervenor The Right People, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for dismissal and discharged denied. Matter will be continued 90 days to permit obtaining a loan and closing escrow.
Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Motion for dismissal and discharged denied. Matter continued 90 days to 03/07/02 for status. Mr. Barker to prepare order.
